title: Foodies! (The Food Update)
description: A minecraft data pack that adds food and drinks to Minecraft. Made for minecraft java edition 1.21.4
body:
## **Ever been sitting in your Minecraft world, eating carrots and potatoes for the 100th time, wishing for more variety and dishes?**

_Well your troubles are over._

Foodies is a fan made update for Minecraft, **The Food Update!** It adds new foods like the following:
- Sandwiches
- Chocolate
- Smores
- Kebabs
And more to come!

_**Please download the resource pack for the textures to show up for custom items.**_
